chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-5362 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. No.19. 2. For hearing of CMA No.24665/2023. 3. For haring of main case. 10.09.2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last fixed on 07.11.2023, which is almost two years ago. Since then, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Perhaps this is because he has a stay order operating in his favour for almost two years. Today none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
